evals.prompt: Create user flows and wireframes for the e-commerce checkout experience based on our PRD
evals.expected_output: Skill locates the PRD via prism-locator, reads it fully, invokes /generate_user_flows with the PRD path, generates user personas, ASCII flow diagrams, wireframes, component library, and responsive specs, then saves to .prism/shared/plans/
expectations: PRD is located and read fully before generating visual docs
/generate_user_flows command is invoked with the PRD file path
Next workflow steps are offered including /prism-plan and /prism-implement

evals.prompt: Design low-fidelity wireframes for our dashboard MVP, we also need a tech spec
evals.expected_output: Skill respects low-fidelity depth calibration, generates both user flows and tech spec via respective commands, saves both documents, and tracks progress with TodoWrite
expectations: Depth calibration matches low-fidelity/MVP — focuses on key flows only
/generate_tech_spec command is also invoked for the tech spec request
Both USER-FLOWS.md and TECHNICAL-SPEC.md files are saved to .prism/shared/plans/
TodoWrite tracks visual doc items (personas, flows, inventory, wireframes, components, breakpoints)

evals.prompt: Map out the user journeys for our mobile app
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers correctly, follows the full 6-step workflow, and quality gates are checked before marking complete
expectations: Quality gates verified: personas, flows (5-10), screen inventory, wireframes, component library, responsive breakpoints, accessibility, states (empty/loading/error/success)
Companion document options offered (tech spec, pricing)
prism-locator agent is spawned to find relevant PRD
